title: Jaipur Weather Today: Hailstorm And Heavy Rain Reported In Parts Of Rajasthan As Cloudy Skies Bring Brief Relief From Scorching Heat - What You Should Know

full_text:
There has been a change in the weather in Jaipur today, providing relief to residents who have been dealing with the high summer temperatures.
Clouds will cover the skies in Jaipur today and there could be some rain at times, particularly early in the morning and potentially later in the afternoon. This will provide a slightly cooler temperature than average for this time of year.
The temperature will be between 30 and 37 degrees Celsius, which is typical for April; however, the cloud cover along with the potential for rain today should help to limit the amount of heat experienced.
Jaipur Weather Today: Heat Trends Still High Despite Temporary Relief
Weather researchers believe the changes in weather over the past couple of weeks are due to changes in atmospheric patterns and should help to reduce the rising temperatures for a short period of time.
Overall, despite this brief period of relief in Jaipur’s weather today, temperatures are expected to remain high overall, as April will start the peak of summer in Jaipur and means that average temperatures will be between 26 and 39 degrees Celsius in Jaipur.
Experts are concerned that this brief period of relief will be short-lived. As Jaipur transitions further into summer, heavy daytime highs are projected for April to reach as high as 36° C. Nights will remain warm, allowing for very little cooling.
Hailstorm Relief Consequences To Jaipur Weather Today
The sudden change in Jaipur weather today follows heavy rainfall and hailstorms reported in nearby districts. Heavy rain and hailstorm have been experienced in several districts such as Ajmer, Jodhpur, and Sikar, where hailstorms caused damage to crops and disrupted many other day-to-day activities.
In some areas, the hailstorm resulted in injuries caused by hail and strong winds. In many of these cities, temperatures dropped between 2°C- 6° C bringing to an end heat waves that had begun earlier.
Reasons For Sudden Weather Changes In Jaipur Weather Today
Meteorologists believe that strange patterns being experienced in Jaipur weather today are being caused by active western disturbances impacting the northern and western region of India. Rainfall, thunderstorm and even hail during this transitional period from winter to summer can be expected.
Weather patterns vary with living’s seasons: during a normal period of time, there will be a few days of coolness, but then come the days that are hot – that’s what we’re going through today with the weather in Jaipur.
Jaipur Weather Today: What Residents Should Expect Next
For today in Jaipur, expect more of the same: brief moments of temperature relief followed by hot and dry conditions. While it is expected that the cool and damp days of today will only last until late morning, it will soon be back to hot and dry for the rest of the day.
Everyone in Jaipur should be prepared for changing weather, but should stay hydrated, and should not go outside during the hottest part of the day until next week when the weather is forecast to be much hotter throughout April.
